title: Alex Kitson Its For You
description: Multi-award winning comedian and Best of Brighton Fringe Comedy Nominee Alex Kitson returns to Brighton. with his latest hour of stand-up. This time, he’s talking about attention. If you could direct yours his way for a moment at some point in May he'd be very grateful. Best Reviewed Shows of the Edinburgh Fringe 2025 “The future of British comedy ” - ★★★★★ ThreeWeeks “The audience laughter is non-stop” - ★★★★★ The Phoenix Remix “Expertly constructed punchlines... Insanely original” - ★★★★★ European Comedy ISH Edinburgh Comedy Awards 2024 Best Newcomer Nominee Dave’s Funniest Joke of the Edinburgh Fringe 2024 Nominee “He has proper funny bones... He’s going to be a huge star.” - On the Mic “A set that makes you laugh louder than all the laughter around.” - EdFringe Review “a natural comic... almost Robin Williams level” - Chortle
